On-Device Processing
Key Technology

Meet TurboQuant™
More model. Less memory. Zero compromise.

Inspired by research in KV-cache compression and efficient quantization — TurboQuant lets NeuroPocket AI fit bigger, smarter models into the limited RAM of a real phone, without quality collapse.

🔬

KV Cache Compression

Reduces the memory overhead of the attention cache during inference — the biggest RAM bottleneck in transformer-based models on mobile hardware.

📱

Device-Adaptive Quantization

Instead of one-size-fits-all compression, TurboQuant maps optimization levels to your device profile — 4GB, 6GB, 8GB+ — so quality scales intelligently.

⚙️

5 Tunable Levels — No ML Jargon

Off → Mild → Balanced → Aggressive → Extreme. Users control their experience. The app handles the complexity.

🚀

More Capability, Less RAM

Models that previously needed flagship hardware now run comfortably on mid-range phones — unlocking real AI utility for more users.

TurboQuantKV CacheQJL-inspired llama.rnReact NativeGGUFOn-Device

Capabilities

Everything you need.
Nothing sent to the cloud.

Five fully offline AI modes in a single app — built for everyday use, not just demos. Every feature runs entirely on your device. Your data never leaves.

💬
Private AI Chat
Talk to a capable AI model directly on your phone for writing, brainstorming, Q&A, and summarisation. No prompts leave your device — ever.
📄
Document Q&A ✦ PREMIUM
Upload PDFs, TXTs, CSVs, code and more — ask questions with PageIndex tree-based retrieval. Dual-mode RAG: Keyword (BM25 + TF-IDF) or Vector (cosine embedding) search with source citations. 100% on-device.
👁
Vision AI ✦ PREMIUM
Capture an image or pick one from your gallery and get instant on-device analysis. Scene description, visual Q&A, context extraction — all local.
🎙
Voice Studio ✦ PREMIUM
Text-to-speech with speed and pitch control. Listen to AI responses hands-free. Voice-first interaction built for mobile accessibility and multitasking.
🔍
Vector RAG ✦ NEW v3.1
Pure-JS hash-projection embeddings (256-dim, IDF-weighted, L2-norm). Per-document cosine similarity search — no vector DB, no native module, zero APK size increase. Falls back to keyword search gracefully.
🧠
AI Brain
The central model management hub. See active model, installed models, available downloads, and device-matched recommendations — no ML knowledge needed.
🔒
Privacy by Design
No account required. No background telemetry. No cloud inference. Your conversations, documents, and images stay exactly where they belong — on your phone.
Quick Setup

Ready in minutes.
Private for life.

01
Install & Open
Download NeuroPocket AI from the Play Store. Open the app — no sign-in, no cloud account, no setup wall.
02
Choose Your Model
The AI Brain recommends the best model for your device's RAM. One tap to download — TurboQuant handles the rest.
03
Use Anywhere
Chat, analyse documents, inspect images, or use voice — online or completely offline. Your AI, always in your pocket.
AI Brain

Smart model matching.
Zero guesswork.

NeuroPocket AI profiles your device RAM and recommends models guaranteed to run well — no out-of-memory crashes, no trial and error. Just tap and go.

💼

🚀

✈️

🔒

Every prompt stays on your device. No accounts, no telemetry, no cloud inference. Your conversations belong to you — full stop.

🔬

Get Lifetime — ₹999

All purchases processed securely via Google Play Billing. No payment data is collected by NeuroPocket AI.
Subscriptions renew automatically and can be cancelled anytime from Google Play → Subscriptions.
Prices shown in INR. Equivalent local currency charged at checkout.

Everything you need to know
Is the free tier really free, forever?
Yes. The free tier has no time limit and includes unlimited AI chat and models up to 1 GB — forever, no strings attached. Premium upgrades unlock Vision AI, Voice Studio, Document Q&A, Advanced RAG, larger models, and more.
How does the Lifetime plan work?
You pay ₹999 once via Google Play and unlock all premium features permanently — including every new premium feature added in future updates. No recurring charges, ever.
Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
Yes. Manage or cancel your subscription at any time through Google Play Store → Account → Subscriptions. Access continues until the end of your current billing period.
Does NeuroPocket AI store my payment details?
No. All billing is handled entirely by Google Play. NeuroPocket AI only receives a purchase token to verify your entitlement — no card numbers, bank details, or billing addresses are ever shared with us.
What if I switch phones?
Your premium access is tied to your Google Play account. Sign in on a new device, open the app, and tap "Restore Purchases" on the Premium screen to recover your entitlement instantly.
Are refunds available?
Refund requests are handled through Google Play's standard refund policy. You can request a refund within 48 hours of purchase directly from Google Play Store.
